_doc: Faithful replay of a UIA selector-failure investigation. Triage rules captured verbatim; healing-data/history/get-errors stubbed so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

rules._doc: Catch-all: any `or jobs list` (regardless of filters) returns the recorded faulted-jobs list. Lets the agent succeed even if it omits --state Faulted.
Recorded error-level logs that include the NodeNotFoundException + the Healing Agent recommendation-only message.
Stubbed: minimal job-history record showing the single Faulted transition. The original session did not redirect this command.
Stubbed: marker pointing the agent to the project `.uia/improve-NClick_1/` artifacts. The real HA recovery zip is materialized into the project snapshot.
Clean validation result — used after the agent applies the selector fix and re-validates Google.xaml.
Per CLAUDE.md: docsai queries always passthrough — query strings vary between runs and canned responses go stale. Cached per-query within a run.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
